description_long: This is an adult pedestrian dressed in casual vacation attire, featuring a short-sleeved button-up shirt with a floral pattern and knee-length shorts. The individual is accessorized with a wide-brimmed sun hat, sunglasses, a wristwatch, and a camera hanging from a neck strap. Flip-flop sandals are worn on the feet, and the person has a relaxed, upright stance with arms slightly bent at the elbows. The figure's build is average, and the overall appearance suggests a tourist or someone enjoying leisure time outdoors. The clothing and accessories are well-detailed, with visible seams, folds, and realistic proportions.
description: A casually dressed adult pedestrian wearing a sun hat, floral shirt, shorts, and flip-flops, accessorized with a camera and sunglasses. The figure stands upright in a relaxed pose, evoking a tourist or vacationer.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sun hat, sunglasses, floral shirt, camera, shorts, and flip-flops clearly, with both arms visible and relaxed at the sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the sun hat, the camera strap, and the wristwatch, with the arm and leg positions visible in profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the sun hat, shirt, and shorts, as well as the figure's hair and the back of the sandals.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the hat, camera, and arm, with the figure's relaxed stance evident.
attribute_clothing_type: short-sleeved button-up shirt, knee-length shorts, wide-brimmed sun hat, sunglasses, wristwatch, camera on neck strap
